tiktok.caption: 56% of Americans believe this credit card myth — it's quietly draining $92,000 from them. Here's the truth banks won't tell you.

youtube_short.title: The Credit Balance Myth Costing You $92,000
title_alternatives: Stop Carrying a Balance — Here's the $92K Reason Why
56% of Americans Believe This Credit Card Lie
youtube_short.description: Think carrying a credit card balance builds your credit score faster? You're not alone — 56% of Americans believe this. But it's completely false. Your FICO score doesn't care whether you paid in full or left a balance. It only tracks your credit utilization ratio, and carrying a balance makes that worse, not better. Meanwhile, the average cardholder is burning $1,362 a year in interest for a myth that isn't even working. Invest that money instead for 30 years and you'd have $92,000. Pay your card in full every single month. #creditscore #creditcard #personalfinance #moneytips #debtfree

hook_line: 56% of Americans believe this credit myth — it's costing them $92,000
